news.headline: Xi emphasizes 'one country, two systems' as Macao celebrates 25 years of return to China. Commemoration marked with televised ceremony.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Chinese President Xi Jinping emphasized the importance of continuing to uphold the "one country, two systems" principle. This statement came as Macao commemorated 25 years since its reunification with China, acknowledging its remarkable progress. The President's remarks were delivered during a televised event at a significant sports venue.

news.headline: GoldMining renews at-the-market equity program allowing distribution of up to US$50 million. TSX: GOLD, NYSE: GLDG.
news.summary: GoldMining Inc., a company listed on both the TSX (GOLD) and NYSE (GLDG), has extended its at-the-market equity program, known as the ATM Program, permitting the distribution of up to US$50 million (or equivalent in Canadian dollars). The announcement was made in Vancouver, BC on December 20, 2024.

news.headline: Exro Technologies updates on interest payments for outstanding debentures. TSX: EXRO, OTCQB: EXROF.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on December 20, 2024, Exro Technologies Inc. (TSX: EXRO) (OTCQB: EXROF) released an update on their latest developments. The company is known for offering advanced power control electronics enhancing the performance of electric motors and batteries.

news.headline: Miao embroidery gains global popularity as a fashion item, showcasing traditional Chinese craftsmanship and cultural heritage.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024 in Beijing, it was emphasized that intangible cultural heritage is a vital aspect of Chinese identity, showcasing intricate craftsmanship, traditional Chinese medicine, solemn rituals, and vibrant folk art. Over the centuries, these cultural elements have played a crucial role in preserving the essence of Chinese heritage.

news.headline: Tether injects $775M in video-sharing platform Rumble, following its decision to add Bitcoin to its balance sheet.
news.summary: Tether recently revealed a significant $775 million strategic partnership with video sharing platform Rumble. This announcement comes shortly after Rumble stated its decision to incorporate Bitcoin into its assets.

news.headline: Tether injects $775M into video platform Rumble, following Bitcoin addition news.
news.summary: Tether has made a significant investment of $775 million in the video sharing platform Rumble. This move comes shortly after Rumble's declaration of including Bitcoin in its balance sheet.

news.headline: Jump Trading's Tai Mo Shan to settle SEC probe by paying $123M for alleged violations.
Immutable Holdings Inc. disclosed voting outcome for Annual General Meeting; occurred on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Immutable Holdings Inc. (NEO:HOLD), a publicly-traded blockchain holding company, shared the outcomes of its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders held on the same day. The meeting results were discussed by the Corporation in Toronto.

news.headline: Optical Cable Corporation will discuss Q4 and FY 2024 results in a conference call on Dec. 23.
news.summary: Roanoke-based company Optical Cable Corporation, trading on Nasdaq GM under the ticker symbol OCC, has revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 on December 23, 2024. This update will encompass the outcomes for the three-month interval and the overall fiscal year.

news.headline: New University of Macau campus in Hengqin, 375,600 sqm, opens in 2028 for collaborative development.
news.summary: In Beijing on December 20, 2024, it was reported that the University of Macau is constructing a new campus in the Guangdong-Macao In-Depth Cooperation Zone in Hengqin. Spanning about 375,600 square meters, the campus is scheduled to be completed by 2028. It will provide accommodations for a significant number of students and staff.

news.headline: Tether invests $775M in Rumble after Youtube competitor pushes Bitcoin, adopting BTC reserve strategy.
news.summary: Tether, a stablecoin issuer, has decided to invest a substantial amount of $775 million in the popular streaming video platform, Rumble. This platform has recently embraced a strategy that involves a reserve of Bitcoin.

news.headline: Teamsters plan midnight strike at Amazon (AMZN) NYC warehouse.
Schumer working towards passing stopgap tonight
Schumer speaks to reporters
Qualcomm victorious in licensing battle with Arm, securing chip designs. Details undisclosed.
Eli Lilly's weight-loss drug Zepbound approved for sleep apnea treatment, impacting ResMed's market share.
news.summary: On Friday, Eli Lilly received FDA approval for Zepbound, its weight-loss medication, to be used in treating obstructive sleep apnea. This development raises questions about the impact on ResMed's market share.

news.headline: FDA approves Vertex's next-generation triple drug for cystic fibrosis. Stock not expected to rise much.
news.summary: Late on Friday, the Food and Drug Administration approved Vertex Pharmaceuticals' advanced triple drug for cystic fibrosis. This positive development may not have an immediate impact on the stock performance of Vertex Pharmaceuticals.

news.headline: Tai Mo Shan of Jump Trading agrees to settle SEC case by paying $123 million.
Elevai Labs Inc. now PMGC Holdings Inc., relocating to Nevada in a strategic move.
news.summary: A recent report unveils that the global population has surpassed 7.8 billion people, with projections indicating it could reach 9.7 billion by 2050. Urban areas have seen significant growth over rural regions, with over half of the population now residing in cities. The rise in urbanization is expected to continue, with estimates suggesting that 68% of the population will live in urban areas by 2050. This trend poses challenges for infrastructure, resource management, and social services in urban centers. To address these issues, experts highlight the need for sustainable urban planning and development to ensure the well-being of future generations.

news.headline: SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. buys facilities in Washington, D.C., and San Jose, adding 74,300 sq ft property in DC.
news.summary: SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc., based in LADERA RANCH, Calif., has acquired two premier self-storage facilities to strengthen its position in key markets. The Washington, D.C., facility at 1401 22nd Street SE is a Class A property with five stories, providing roughly 74,300 net rentable square feet. In addition, the company also acquired a facility in San Jose, California. The strategic acquisitions mark expansion for SmartStop in prominent locations, demonstrating its commitment to growth and enhancing its portfolio.

news.headline: Bunker Hill to issue 7,392,859 shares in lieu of $517,500 interest payment on Convertible Debentures.
news.summary: Bunker Hill Mining Corp. (TSXV:BNKR | OTCQB:BHLL) located in Kellogg, Idaho and Vancouver, British Columbia, made an announcement on Dec. 20, 2024. The company elected to issue a total of 7,392,859 shares of common stock, referred to as "Interest Shares," to specific holders of 7.5% and 10.5% convertible debentures. This issuance was done to fully settle the interest owed under the Series 1 and Series 2 Convertible Debentures, totaling USD$517,500.00 as of December 31, 2024, making up the "Interest Payment." The Convertible Debentures have maturity dates of March 31, 2028, and March 31, 2029, respectively.

news.headline: 2025 Kia K4 compact sedan earns 2024 IIHS TSP award for occupant protection. Located in Irvine, Calif.
news.summary: In Irvine, California on December 20, 2024, the 2025 Kia K4 compact sedan stands out for its occupant protection, earning the esteemed Insurance Institute of Highway Safety's 2024 IIHS TOP SAFETY PICK (TSP) Award. This recognition highlights the vehicle's commitment to safety standards, benefitting all passengers.

news.headline: IB Parks & Entertainment acquires Big Kahuna's Water Park in West Berlin, NJ, expanding its attractions portfolio.
news.summary: A new attraction, Big Kahuna's Water Park in West Berlin, New Jersey, has been added to IB Parks & Entertainment's portfolio on December 20, 2024. This park, previously called Sahara Sam's Oasis, now joins the company's expanding list of attractions. Big Kahuna's Water Park offers year-round entertainment options, in a location known for its diverse range of activities.

news.headline: Investigation into Methode Electronics, Inc. by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC initiated by former Louisiana Attorney General.
news.summary: In New Orleans on December 20, 2024, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC ("KSF"), disclosed an ongoing investigation into Methode Electronics, Inc. The inquiry into Methode Electronics, Inc. (NYSE: MEI) began on March 7, 2024.

news.headline: Former Louisiana AG Charles C. Foti, Jr., of Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC investigates Masimo Corp. (NasdaqGS: MASI) officers and directors - initiated on July 17, 2024.
news.summary: In New Orleans on December 20, 2024, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed that the firm is launching an inquiry into Masimo Corporation (NasdaqGS: MASI). The investigation was initiated on July 17, 2024, to scrutinize the company's operations and financial activities.

news.headline: Former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr. and KSF investigate officers and directors of Macy's, Inc. on NYSE: M since November 25, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and now a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, declared that the firm has initiated a probe into Macy's, Inc. (NYSE: M). The investigation began on November 25, 2024.

news.headline: Former Louisiana AG starts investigation into MongoDB, Inc. Directors/officers; KSF begins probe of $MDB on May 30, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Charles C. Foti Jr., a former Louisiana Attorney General who is now a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed that their firm has initiated an inquiry into MongoDB, Inc. (NasdaqGM: MDB). The investigation, which started on May 30, 2024, focuses on certain aspects related to the company.

news.headline: ESOP Association backs Rep. Lori Chavez-DeRemer with a six-figure campaign for U.S. Secretary of Labor.
news.summary: A six-figure campaign has been launched by The ESOP Association in Washington to support Lori Chavez-DeRemer, the nominee for Secretary of Labor by President-elect Donald Trump.

news.headline: Sony Electronics, ERI, T&N, and Friends of Hawaii Charities offer free e-waste recycling event in Honolulu at Waikiki Elementary School. Residents can responsibly recycle unwanted electronics.
news.summary: Sony Electronics Inc., ERI, and T&N are partnering to offer Hawaii residents a free opportunity to recycle unwanted electronics at Waikiki Elementary School's 'Going Green Day' in Honolulu. ERI, a top electronics recycler and cybersecurity hardware destruction company, and T&N, Hawaii's primary e-waste collector, will collaborate during the first weekend in January for the event. This initiative aims to provide a convenient solution for residents to responsibly dispose of their old electronics. Don't miss the chance to participate in this free collection event and contribute to a more sustainable future for Hawaii.

news.headline: Stock market bulls rebound after a bearish week, with Palantir leading. Government shutdown likely averted.
news.summary: Friday saw a turnaround in the stock market as bulls regained strength after a bearish week. Palantir emerged as one of the top performers. There is a possibility that a government shutdown could be avoided. Dow Jones Futures show signs of recovery after a recent sell-off. Investors are advised to stay informed and proactive amidst these developments.

news.headline: Schumer aims to pass stopgap measure quickly
Schumer confident Senate will pass stopgap
Mustang Energy acquires 17,929 hectares in Saskatchewan for potential uranium and rare earth element exploration.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 20, 2024, Mustang Energy Corp. revealed the successful acquisition of 100% ownership of the Spur Project, positioned south of the Athabasca Basin in northern Saskatchewan. Through economical staking, the Company obtained nine dispositions equating to 17,929 hectares, enriching the developing portfolio of Mustang. The project's location presents an opportunity for uranium and rare earth element (REE) exploration. Mustang Energy Corp. can be identified through the following stock symbols: CSE: MEC, OTC: MECPF, FRA:92T.

news.headline: Stock market turned bearish as Fed hinted at fewer rate cuts; Russell index plunges while Jabil breaks out.
news.summary: Despite a decline in stock market indexes reaching session lows, certain leaders demonstrated significant, vigorous activity following the Federal Reserve's indication of fewer expected rate cuts next year. The Russell index plunged as market conditions turned bearish. Noteworthy among the performances was Jabil, which experienced a breakout. This information was reported on Investor's Business Daily's live coverage.

news.headline: Fatal attack on German Christmas market leaves 2 dead, authorities investigating.
US prevails over Mexico in dispute regarding genetically modified corn.
Fed cuts rates, plans 2 more cuts in 2025; S&P 500 falls due to doubt on dovish policy.
news.summary: As anticipated, the Federal Reserve reduced interest rates and projected two additional cuts for 2025. However, the S&P 500 index declined amidst concerns about the Fed's commitment to its accommodative monetary policy. This news signals a cautious outlook among investors despite the Fed's future rate cut plans.

news.headline: Powell's hawkish Fed stance causes market chaos: VIX up 58%, Stocks plunge, Dollar at 2-year high, Bitcoin drops 5%.
news.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell announced a 0.25% interest rate cut to a range of 4.25%-4.5% during the December Fed meeting. The updated economic projections suggested only two potential rate cuts in 2025, down from four projected in September, leading to a market bloodbath. Stocks plummeted, the U.S. dollar surged to two-year highs, and Bitcoin dropped over 5%. Powell emphasized a "new phase" for monetary policy and mentioned rates are closer to neutral after 100 basis points of cuts in 2024. The CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) rose 58% to 25, indicating heightened investor uncertainty over future interest rates.

news.headline: Mike Ransford appointed as Site Manager at Syntec Optics (Nasdaq: OPTX) in Rochester.
news.summary: On December 16, 2024, Syntec Optics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: OPTX) based in Rochester, New York, disclosed the selection of Michael J. Ransford as the new Site Manager. Syntec Optics is renowned for delivering vital products to cutting-edge technology defense, biomedical, and communications equipment producers. Ransford’s responsibilities in this position will involve supervising technology and operational aspects for the company.

news.headline: FCPT buys 9 American Family Care properties for $21.2M, expanding urgent care footprint to 384 clinics in 33 states.
news.summary: Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), a real estate investment trust specializing in net-leased restaurant and retail properties, recently acquired nine American Family Care properties for a total of $21.2 million. American Family Care, a provider of urgent care, family care, and primary care services, operates 384 clinics in 33 states. The acquisition is part of FCPT's strategy to invest in high-quality properties and expand its portfolio. This move will enhance FCPT's presence in the healthcare sector and further solidify its position in the market.

news.headline: Jefferies suggests considering elimination of debt limit, according to Axios.
Pioneering L.G.B.T.Q. journalist, Troy Masters, passes away at 63. Led Gay City News and The Los Angeles Blade since 2017.
news.summary: He led prominent publications, such as Gay City News in New York City and The Los Angeles Blade since 2017.

news.headline: Elon Musk supports Johnson's plan to prevent shutdown as House vote commences amid growing concerns.
Win a Whataburger wedding on Las Vegas Strip for one lucky couple on Valentine's Day.
news.summary: A fortunate couple has the chance to win a unique Whataburger-themed wedding on the iconic Las Vegas Strip. Whataburger is offering couples the opportunity to say their vows with a Whataburger in hand this Valentine's Day. This one-of-a-kind wedding experience will surely make hearts flutter and taste buds delight.

news.headline: Rock Mountain Technology rebrands as Tech Legion, aiming for growth beyond Utah. Known for IT services for 15 years.
news.summary: A company based in Salt Lake City, formerly known as Rock Mountain Technology (RMT), has officially rebranded as Tech Legion. With over 15 years of experience in providing managed IT services, the company aims to expand its reach beyond Utah into various markets across the Intermountain West and beyond. Tech Legion has gained recognition for its top-notch IT services tailored for mid- and small-sized businesses, with a focus on IT outsourcing and cybersecurity. The rebranding signifies the company's growth and its ambitious plans for the future.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures rebound as bulls fight back after sell-off. Palantir leads winners; government shutdown may be imminent.
news.summary: After a week of bearish trends, stock market bulls made a comeback on Friday. Palantir emerged as one of the top performers. The possibility of a government shutdown looms. The latest update on Dow Jones Futures highlights the market rebound with Palantir leading the way. For investors, it is essential to assess the current situation and strategize for potential market shifts.

Mike Johnson urges fast approval of funding bill in the Senate
Mike Johnson Believes Trump is Happy About the Outcome
